sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97817" key="sugklhro/nomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκληρόνομ-ος</orth> (parox.), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n97817.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joint-heir</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Χριστοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:8:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg010.perseus-grc1:3:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Eph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
